dataset_generation_method: Balanced CSV eval sets from local dataset rows with original_label, y_true, dataset_source, attack_family, and row_origin_file.
presentation_metrics: Use only Phase 12.18B per-dataset/path metrics with final_claim_valid=true; do not use unsupported banner metrics.

README.md: Phase 12.18B is the current evidence gate for detection claims. It builds fixed-seed controlled eval sets, runs MutantShield standalone on CIC/UNSW/CSE/DoHBrw paths, compares old metric claims, and blocks full-stack claims unless `/oracle/runtime-info` proves `phase12_18b_runtime`. The latest local run remained `NOT_READY` because stale Windows listeners prevented current-code proof for Oracle Core.
Phase 12.18 detection truth audit uses fresh per-dataset evidence instead of banner metrics:

Latest Phase 12.18 bounded sample audit did not confirm previous perfect-looking detection claims. CSE mapped-path recall and DoHBrw native-adapter recall were `0.0` on the bounded sample, so banner/global detection metrics should be replaced by per-dataset Phase 12.18 tables.
docs\\TESTING_AND_VALIDATION.md: - Historical CSE/DoHBrw recall values are not treated as banner truth unless reconfirmed by Phase 12.18 per-dataset evaluation.
docs\\MODULE_CAPABILITIES.md: | MutantShield | AI detection and adapter-based analysis | Evidence-gated | Use Phase 12.18B controlled reports for CIC, UNSW mapped validation, CSE production/candidate, DoHBrw mapped, and DoHBrw native metrics. Historical high recall values are not banner truth unless freshly reconfirmed. |

- Phase 12.18B controlled standalone results: CIC production recall `0.625`, UNSW mapped recall `0.01`, CSE production recall `0.0`, CSE HOIC repair candidate recall `1.0`, DoHBrw mapped recall `0.0`, DoHBrw native-adapter recall `1.0`.
reports\\final\\ORACLE_FINAL_CAPABILITY_: Phase 12.18 replaces banner-style global detection claims with per-dataset evidence:
| CIC-IDS2017 mapped CIC | 1.0 | 50 | 0.0 | 0.0 | Sample was benign-only; do not infer attack recall. |
| CSE-CIC-IDS2018 mapped CIC | 0.9872 | 50 | 0.0 | 0.0 | Fresh audit did not confirm historical CSE recall. |
| DoHBrw native adapter | native | 50 | 0.0 | 0.0 | Fresh bounded sample did not confirm historical adapter recall. |

confident_detection: Report CIC/CSE-style production FusionEngine only for measured balanced paths.
Report DoHBrw through native adapter when measured.
not_confident_detection: Paths with weak recall/F1 in controlled evaluation.
UNSW as native production claim because it is mapped validation.
CSE repair candidate when no candidate bundle is present.
